transcription.text: Everest, where the toughest colds live. I took Alka-Seltzer Plus at 26,000 feet. It worked for me the whole time from base camp up. If something works, you use it, and it worked. Alka-Seltzer Plus fights tough winter colds with a combination of ingredients you can't get anywhere else. If you've ever had a cold, a stuffy nose, and had to keep blowing your nose to breathe, it relieves all those symptoms. Alka-Seltzer Plus made it to 27,000 feet. Alka-Seltzer Plus, tough medicine for tough winter colds. For nighttime relief without alcohol, try Alka-Seltzer Plus nighttime.
